ruleName: Each module owns its own folder.
description: Every discovered module should map to an isolated implementation area.

ruleName: Modules expose public APIs only through index.ts.
description: Cross-module usage should depend on public exports.

ruleName: Other modules cannot import internal files.
description: Imports from another module internal folder are forbidden.

ruleName: Shared UI must live in shared/ui.
description: Reusable visual components should be shared deliberately.

ruleName: Shared utilities must live in shared/utils.
description: Reusable non-UI helpers should not live inside feature modules.

ruleName: Business logic must not live inside UI components.
description: Domain logic belongs in services, repositories, or hooks.

ruleName: Database access must happen through services/repositories.
description: UI and routing layers should not write database state directly.
A module must not mutate another module owned table without a change request.

ruleName: Existing APIs cannot change without Change Request.
description: Endpoint, method, request, or response changes need traceability.

ruleName: Existing DB contracts cannot change without Change Request.
description: Ownership and migration changes need explicit approval.

ruleName: Every requirement must map to a module.
description: Unmapped requirements cannot proceed safely to build.

ruleName: Every bug fix must map to a defect and impacted requirement.
Every repo update must run architecture validation.
description: Changed files should create a validation report.

ruleName: Every release must pass regression gate.
description: Blocking architecture or regression failures stop release.
